<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpClient\Chunk; use Symfony\Contracts\HttpClient\ChunkInterface; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> * * @internal */ class DataChunk implements ChunkInterface { public function __construct( private int $offset = 0, private string $content = '', ) { } public function isTimeout(): bool { return false; } public function isFirst(): bool { return false; } public function isLast(): bool { return false; } public function getInformationalStatus(): ?array { return null; } public function getContent(): string { return $this->content; } public function getOffset(): int { return $this->offset; } public function getError(): ?string { return null; } }
